source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder contains 0.5 m^3 of some substance at 2 MPa, 150\circ\text{C}. The piston mass and atmosphere give a pressure of 450 kPa that will float the piston. The whole setup cools in a freezer maintained at−20\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer when T2 = −20\circ\text{C}.

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: A piston/cylinder contains 0.5 m^3 of some substance at 2 MPa, 150\circ\text{C}. The piston mass and atmosphere give a pressure of 450 kPa that will float the piston. The whole setup cools in a freezer maintained at−20\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer when T2 = −20\circ\text{C}.
